Container.Name: gitlab-runner
Container.Overview: GitLab Runner for Unraid with automatic registration. Registers itself at your GitLab instance on first start using a Runner Token. Supports Docker and Shell executors.
Container.Description: GitLab Runner for Unraid with automatic registration. Registers itself at your GitLab instance on first start using a Runner Token. Supports Docker and Shell executors.

Config.Name: GitLab URL
Config.Description: URL of your GitLab instance (e.g. https://gitlab.com or https://gitlab.example.com)

Config.Name: Runner Token
Config.Description: Runner authentication token. Create one in GitLab under Settings > CI/CD > Runners. Modern tokens start with glrt-.

Config.Name: Runner Name
Config.Description: Display name for this runner in GitLab.

Config.Name: Default Docker Image
Config.Description: Default Docker image used for CI jobs (only relevant for Docker executor).

Config.Name: Concurrent Jobs
Config.Description: Maximum number of jobs to run in parallel.

Config.Name: Runner Tags
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of tags (only effective with legacy registration tokens).

Config.Name: Run Untagged Jobs
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to pick up jobs without tags (only effective with legacy registration tokens).

Config.Name: Lock to Project
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to lock runner to the current project (only effective with legacy registration tokens).

Config.Name: Docker Privileged Mode
Config.Description: Run Docker-in-Docker in privileged mode. Required for some CI tasks like building Docker images.

Config.Name: Additional Docker Volumes
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of additional volumes to mount in job containers (e.g. /cache:/cache,/builds:/builds).

Config.Name: Unregister on Stop
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to automatically unregister the runner when the container stops.

Config.Name: CA Certificate Path
Config.Description: Path to a custom CA certificate file inside the container (e.g. /etc/gitlab-runner/certs/ca.crt).

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for the Docker executor. Required when using executor 'docker'.
